reasons: Angela can attach to Lukas during his brawl window.
Lukas benefits from added protection because he wants to remain in the fight after entering.

proof.summary: Angela extends Lukas's commit window with attached protection.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Lukas fully commits.
Lukas uses the shield window to force out a core target.
failureCases: Lukas enters after Angela's ultimate is unavailable.
Enemy burst removes Lukas before sustain matters.

reasons: Chip can bring teammates into Lukas's frontline brawl.
Lukas can start pressure first, then Chip helps convert it into a numbers advantage.

proof.summary: Lukas creates the brawl, while Chip brings fast team follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Lukas starts a fight teammates can safely join.
Chip opens Shortcut after Lukas creates pressure.
failureCases: Chip portals the team into counter-engage.
The fight moves away from the portal.

reasons: Floryn gives Lukas global sustain during long fights.
Lukas benefits from healing support because he wants to keep fighting after his first entry.

proof.summary: Floryn extends Lukas's brawl window with global healing.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Lukas's real commit.
Lukas avoids being burst before healing applies.
failureCases: Lukas is chain-controlled before he can continue fighting.

reasons: Mathilda improves Lukas's entry and retreat options.
Lukas can use her mobility support to reach better targets or reset after trading.

proof.summary: Mathilda helps Lukas reposition during extended brawls.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays near Lukas's fight path.
Lukas uses the mobility window after forcing enemy cooldowns.
failureCases: Enemy crowd control blocks the retreat.
Mathilda uses the mobility tool before Lukas commits.

reasons: Kalea can grab and displace a target, giving Lukas a clearer target to hit.
Her healing and control support fit Lukas's extended fighter style.

proof.summary: Kalea isolates a target, while Lukas follows with brawler damage and pressure.
worksBestWhen: Kalea displaces the target toward Lukas.
Lukas has cooldowns ready to follow the grab.
failureCases: Kalea throws the target away from Lukas.
Lukas is not close enough to follow.
Enemy peel blocks Lukas after the displacement.
